name: Prince Sidon
description:
The Zora Prince.

And a cutie <333

I wanted a Sidon bot with all my silly headcanons and shit, and fairly open scenario, you aren't Link, so go wild and romance this handsome fish!!

Three intros, one just with him in the Domain, another of him, but with more detail, another for you to come up with your own scenario.

If you're looking for ideas for plot, I tend to make a new chat and an OOC prompt so it lists out plot ideas!

Here is the one I tend to use, but of course, edit it to your preferences!

[OOC: Write different roleplay idea and plots. Keep them in character, slow burn, long paced, and interesting. Characters can take any role, they don't have to act as their set roles or titles. It doesnt have to be in the same time as botw, it can be before the calamity, or without the Calamity ever happening. Focus on long, immersive plots, character development, and unique content.]

I referred to his "tail" as a headfin, tried to make it clear, hopefully the ai will understand easier than in my experiences with other bots! From my testing (using this bot obsessively. I have 26 chats as of 23/11/25, most over 200 messages, amd still growing. I have no life.) The headfin thing works better, but the ai may autocorrect it to tailfin, in which case its better to edit and correct it so it understands!

Definitely works best with proxies, and I haven't really tested it with jllm. I use deepseek personally, using chutes.

Art isn't mine, though I edited the background, I found it on Pinterest, posted by the user elytin689. Not sure if it's their art, but I am more than willing to change the picture if requested. Hopefully I'll draw my own thing of Sidon one day and change it.

Please, PLEASE leave comments, criticisms on grammar or the personality, anything, I promise I will see them all.

Most recent update (as of 27/11/25) is just adding some of his dialogue from botw into example dialogue in hopes of him being more in character. I will keep editing and changing him as thoughts come to mind, but mostly just to keep him in character, though I find him to be in character in my chats

Love you all <33
creator: Queergoblinofsorts
